name: DynamicPageTitle
description: The always-visible sticky title area of DynamicPage. Mandatory slot — DynamicPage without DynamicPageTitle renders incorrectly. Contains the page heading, breadcrumb navigation, variant management toggle, and page-level action buttons. Remains visible even when the DynamicPageHeader collapses.

props.name: primaryArea
props.description: Controls the layout of the title area. Begin (default) places the heading on the left. Use Begin for standard enterprise screens.

props.name: areaShrinkRatio
props.description: Ratio controlling how the three areas (begin, middle, end) shrink relative to each other. Use default in most cases.

events.name: stateChange
events.description: Fired when the DynamicPageTitle expand/collapse state changes.

slots.name: heading
slots.description: The main page title. Use sap.m.Title with level H1 for the primary screen heading. Always set — an empty title area violates SAP Fiori guidelines.

slots.name: snappedHeading
slots.description: Title shown when the DynamicPageHeader is collapsed (snapped state). Can differ from the expanded heading — e.g. show a shorter title when space is limited.

slots.name: breadcrumbs
slots.description: Navigation breadcrumb trail. Optional — use on screens that are reached via navigation (not root screens).

slots.name: actions
slots.description: Page-level action buttons (Create, Export all, Edit). These are actions on the entire page scope — NOT row actions or list actions. Use OverflowToolbar to contain them for overflow behavior.

slots.name: navigationActions
slots.description: Secondary navigation actions placed at the far right of the title area.

slots.name: content
slots.description: Content shown only when the header is expanded. Collapses with the header.

slots.name: snappedContent
slots.description: Content shown only when the header is collapsed (snapped state).

slots.name: expandedContent
slots.description: Content shown only when the header is expanded.

notes: Only valid as the title slot of sap.f.DynamicPage — never used standalone.
The actions slot holds PAGE-LEVEL actions (Create, Export). List-level actions (bulk delete) go in the table toolbar. Row-level actions go in ColumnListItem.
showVariantManagement is not a property of DynamicPageTitle — VariantManagement is placed in the heading or actions slot as a separate control on List Report screens.
On worklist floorplan: no VariantManagement in any slot.
On list-report floorplan: VariantManagement control placed in the heading slot alongside the Title.

keyboard: Enter/Space — toggle header expand/collapse when title area is focused
notes: heading slot should contain sap.m.Title with appropriate level (H1 for main page title).
Action buttons in actions slot must have text or tooltip for screen reader access.

examples.title: Worklist title — no VariantManagement
whenToUse: Worklist screens — no VariantManagement, simple heading with optional page-level action
whenNotToUse: Do not add VariantManagement to Worklist — there are no user-defined filter sets to save
